neighborhoods.name: Corfu Old Town (Kerkyra)
neighborhoods.description: UNESCO Venetian-style old town with narrow kantouni alleys, Liston arcade, and twin fortresses
neighborhoods.character: Venetian UNESCO, compact walkable, cultural events

housing.predominantType: Apartments in Venetian and British-era buildings

neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of Corfu Town. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Corfu Town

neighborhoods.name: Gouvia / Kontokali
neighborhoods.description: Coastal villages north of town with marinas, beaches, and residential development
neighborhoods.character: Coastal residential, marina access, beach lifestyle
neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to Corfu Town's center and services.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Corfu Town

neighborhoods.name: Potamos / Kanoni
neighborhoods.description: Residential areas south of town with airport proximity and lower costs
neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Corfu Town

neighborhoods.name: Northeast Coast (Kassiopi/Barbati)
neighborhoods.description: Scenic northeast coastline with established British expat community, clear waters, and mountain backdrops
neighborhoods.character: Scenic coast, British expat enclave, nature-oriented

housing.predominantType: Villas, restored stone houses, and coastal properties

neighborhoods.character_notes: Area with established international community and expat-oriented services. English is more commonly spoken here than in other neighborhoods.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Corfu Town
